name: HPV33_E6_oncogene
description: HPV33 E6 oncoprotein-coding region (high-risk HPV, alpha-9 species). E6 binds and targets p53 for ubiquitin-mediated degradation via the E6-AP (UBE3A) ligase, abolishing the G1 checkpoint after DNA damage. Contains two CxxC zinc-binding motifs. In integrated forms in cervical cancer the E6/E7 cassette is preserved while E1/E2 are often disrupted, removing E2-mediated repression of the early promoter and driving constitutive E6/E7 expression. Sequence ~50-60% identical between high-risk types — paralog-disambiguation required when typing from clinical mixed-type samples.
expected_copy_count: 1 per episomal genome; multiple integrated copies in carcinoma
